message: Jake
Ginny
Gabriela
Oh, it was you.
Hello, it's been a while.
It's perfect timing, I have something to talk about.
Yeah, we haven't finished our conversation.
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move

about the ring
's matter
about Tony
about Director Fabar

It's a simple, bright, and stylish office. Just in the parts I can see, it must have cost hundreds of thousands of dollars.
No matter how grand the office is, when I think about the money it was earned with,
Having an office in a place like Manhattan,
the sex trade seems to be doing pretty well.
At first glance, it has a respectable vibe, but I wonder if she used to take clients?
She seems to extremely dislike getting involved with the police, but she doesn't seem scared.
Is she used to this kind of thing?
Sitting in a rattan chair with her back to the window.
Actually, I was just thinking I wanted to see you.
I'm sorry for not contacting you even though I accepted the request.
Hmm, that's not what I meant.
That's not what I'm saying.
Did you see today's news?
No, I've been out of touch with the media lately.
Sorry.
I see, you haven't seen it.
This is tough.
What should I do?
You might want to think about it a bit more.
Actually, you know,
I want you to forget about the request to look for her.
Ah.
I apologize,
but I haven't been neglecting your case.
No, it's fine. It was impossible from the start. Plus, that girl was dead the moment her left hand was cut off.
What!?
To be precise, it seems either her left arm was severed, and then only her left hand was dismembered, or the hand was cut off post-mortem.
Did you look into it?
In this line of work, I have various connections. I actually knew earlier, but I’m sorry for the late contact.
So the request is no longer valid?
There's no point in looking for someone who's dead. I wanted to do something if they were alive, no matter how they looked.
I'm sorry for dragging you into this, but please just forget about this matter.
But,
there are things that could become problematic if it gets to the police, you know. Was it that woman reporter who got the ear?
Ah, yes.
If it’s the same perpetrator,
I don’t want to have any contact with the police, please understand.
Thank you for everything. It's not much, but I've transferred what I owe you so far. So please forget all of this.
Ah, I don't even want to remember. But because of that,
I realized.
Well, about that, don't you think it's strange?
Strange? What is?
I think that ring is quite valuable. To just refuse something so expensive.
Oh, that's true.
I just thought it was simple resentment, so I figured it wouldn't mean anything to the culprit regardless of the ring's value.
I'm sorry, but I'm just a bit...
There have been a lot of things going on, and I don't even know what to say.
I'm sorry,
but the topic is really too much for me right now.
was such a, a really good girl.
Tony Ford's life now is like a facade dressed up with fictional past glories.
I thought he might be the culprit,
but he's such an inscrutable guy.
Huh? Who do you mean?
Director Fabar.
Ah.
I don't care what Martin is doing or where he is.
Did he slip up again?
Is there something you're troubled about if you ask me?
That can't possibly be true. Stop your unnecessary suspicions.
Just ask Martin directly. He'll talk about anything, you know?
Since the request was canceled, I have no obligation to do anything for her.
But I can't just leave this case alone.
You seem to be terribly tired.
Did you feel such a strong shock from her death?
I can't say that seems to be the case.
It's better than standing on the street, but being a call girl is dangerous. Such things can happen too. She seemed like a cooler woman.
What kind of story are you planning to bring up now?
What happened, I wonder,
something seems off about her. Is she tired, or has she given up on something?
I've come up to today without actually having a proper conversation with Tony.
I need to talk to him quickly,
and move forward with the matter.
There's no doubt that Tonny is the last customer.
If that's the case, I might be able to get valuable information from him.
What should I do about my suspicions toward him? He could know something.
If by any chance he is,
kidnapping her, then does that mean I won't report it to Gabriela?
It may have seemed like a fleeting moment, but it’s a fact that we shared skin.
I mean, there's no way she's holed up in a hotel with some random pervert.
Is the matter canceled?
But maybe she also died at the hands of the same perpetrator as Eva.
Is it really okay to just give up like this?
After relying on him, I've come this far without making any progress by not being able to meet Tonny.
After spending so much wasted time,
if something happens to her, wouldn’t that be my responsibility?
Is the matter canceled?
But maybe she also died at the hands of the same perpetrator as Eva.
Is it really okay to just give up like this?
It's not that I neglected her matter because I didn’t have contact with her,
I feel pathetic that, even though I think I need to do something quickly, the only idea I have right now is to talk to Tonny.
I don’t really understand why it was canceled, but there hasn't been any progress until now, so I guess it can’t be helped.
But still, stopping halfway through feels somehow unpleasant.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
